summary: A humble, hard-working 3-4-2-1 full of goals — winger 1v1s, overlapping wing-backs and a relentless work-rate.
style: 3-4-2-1 — winger 1v1, overlapping wing-backs, flood the box for crosses, counter-press positioning, big work-rate.

counterReliance.note: Possession & crossing, counter-press to win it back

strengths: Overlapping wing-backs and 1v1 wingers feeding crosses

keyPlayers.name: Ayase Ueda
keyPlayers.note: Goalscoring (25 in the Eredivisie) with a strong work-ethic back

tactics: Get wing-backs overlapping and wingers isolated, flood the box, and counter-press to win it straight back. Humble, hard-working and full of goals.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
